summary:
The patient is on terfenadine, a medication metabolized by CYP3A4, whose toxicity can lead to cardiac arrhythmias if accumulated due to enzyme inhibition. Only erythromycin, a well-documented potent inhibitor of CYP3A4, poses this risk among the listed antibiotics.  

$\boxed{\text{C}}$

$\boxed{\text{C}}$. Answer choice: C
